title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext is Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model that predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track with high confidence days in advance, enabling the National Hurricane Center to issue timely evacuation warnings. The system successfully forecast a Category 5 hurricane landfall in Jamaica in October 2025, demonstrating AI's practical application in meteorology and disaster risk reduction.
